title: Sign in and reach the authenticated dashboard
description: A returning learner can sign in with email and password and lands on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit credentials
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Launch today's practice session from the dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated learner can view the daily queue on the dashboard and successfully start a practice session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to the dashboard
Click the control to start today's session
Verify the practice session interface is displayed
Verify at least one practice item is shown

title: Complete a multi-card practice session and view summary
description: A learner can complete a practice session across cards with per-card feedback and sees a session summary at the end.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit credentials
Click the action to start practice from the dashboard
Submit a valid response for the current card
Verify immediate correctness feedback for the card is displayed
Continue to the next card
Complete the remaining cards in the session using valid responses
Verify a session summary is displayed

title: Sign up and begin onboarding
description: A new learner can create an account and is routed into onboarding to start first-run setup.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a new email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit sign up
Verify the user lands on onboarding

title: Dashboard deep-link opens practice and begins the session
description: Verifies a user can use the dashboard entry point to reach practice and begin without extra blockers.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to the dashboard
Click a queued item or continue button to open the session
Verify the user is in an active practice session
Verify the session shows progress through items

title: Complete onboarding to seed starter words and reach dashboard
description: A new learner can finish level selection, topic selection, and starter word confirmation and then reach the dashboard with learning content available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a new email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit sign up
Answer the level test questions with valid selections
Select one or more topics of interest
Confirm starter words to add to the deck
Complete onboarding
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify a daily learning queue is displayed

title: Dashboard renders daily target and queued items after login
description: Verifies the dashboard shows the daily target and a list of upcoming queued items for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to the dashboard
Verify a daily target indicator is displayed
Verify next queued learning items are displayed

title: Complete a quiz stage and view aggregated results
description: A learner can submit quiz answers and then sees aggregated results and progress for that stage.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit credentials
Click the action to open practice
Proceed until a quiz stage is shown
Submit answers for the quiz stage
Verify aggregated quiz results are displayed
Verify progress for the session is displayed

title: Daily queue updates after completing a practice session
description: Verifies finishing a practice session returns the learner to the dashboard with updated progress or queue state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to the dashboard
Click the control to start today's session
Complete the practice session by advancing through all remaining items
Exit the session to return to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows updated daily progress for today
Verify the next queued items list reflects the post-session state

title: Update CEFR level and save profile changes
description: Ensures an authenticated user can edit their CEFR level and save, and the updated profile state is shown after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the user profile
Select a different valid CEFR level
Save profile changes
Verify the profile shows the newly selected CEFR level

title: Browse grammar topics and open a lesson
description: Verifies an authenticated learner can reach the grammar hub, browse topics, and open a lesson page/view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the grammar hub
Click a grammar topic from the list
Open a lesson
Verify a grammar lesson view is displayed
Verify the lesson includes an interactive exercise area

title: Complete a grammar interactive exercise and see completion status
description: Verifies completing an exercise in a grammar lesson marks the lesson as completed in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the grammar hub
Open a grammar lesson that contains an exercise
Complete the interactive exercise by providing valid answers and submitting
Verify the lesson shows a completed status indicator
Verify the exercise is no longer shown as incomplete

title: Opt into the writing challenge after practice and view AI feedback
description: Verifies a learner can finish a practice session, choose the optional writing challenge, submit writing, and view feedback without blocking completion.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to start a practice session
Complete the practice session by advancing through all remaining items
Opt into the optional writing challenge
Fill a short paragraph into the writing response field
Submit the writing response
Verify AI feedback and suggestions are displayed

title: Skip the writing challenge and return to the dashboard
description: Verifies a learner can decline the optional writing challenge after practice and still finish the flow back on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to start a practice session
Complete the practice session by advancing through all remaining items
Decline or skip the optional writing challenge
Verify the user returns to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard daily queue is visible

title: Require level selection before onboarding submission
description: A learner who skips level questions cannot complete onboarding and sees a prompt to complete level selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a new email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit sign up
Scroll to the onboarding submission area
Submit onboarding without answering level questions
Verify a level selection validation prompt is visible

title: Unauthenticated access to dashboard is blocked
description: Verifies a logged-out visitor cannot access the dashboard and is routed to login.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user is prompted to log in

title: Reject invalid CEFR input on profile
description: Ensures the profile form blocks saving when an invalid CEFR value is entered and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open the user profile
Fill an invalid value into the CEFR level field
Save profile changes
Verify a CEFR validation error is visible

title: Block login submission when password is missing
description: A learner attempting to submit login with no password is prevented and sees a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill user@example.com into the email field
Submit credentials
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Unauthenticated access to grammar hub is blocked
description: Verifies a logged-out visitor cannot access the grammar hub and is routed to login.

steps.description: Navigate to /grammar
Verify the user is prompted to log in
